# Abrar Akhunji — AI/ML Engineer & Full-Stack Developer

> Personal portfolio and tech blog at https://abrarakhunji.com

## About

Abrar Akhunji is an AI/ML Engineer and Full-Stack Developer from Gujarat, India. He builds production-ready applications spanning food delivery ecosystems, computer vision systems, and healthcare AI. Currently pursuing a B.E. in Information Technology at Kalol Institute of Technology & Research Center.

## Core Skills

- **AI/ML:** Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, Vision Transformers, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NumPy, Pandas
- **Full-Stack:** Django, React, Next.js, REST APIs, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS
- **Databases:** MySQL, SQLite, Redis, Firebase Firestore
- **Tools:** Git, GitHub, Linux, VS Code, Docker, Vite, GSAP, Three.js

## Featured Projects

1. **GourmetGo** — Full-stack food delivery ecosystem (Next.js, Django, Redis, Razorpay) → https://gourmet-go.vercel.app/
2. **Cattle Breed ID** — AI system classifying 41 Indian cattle breeds using Vision Transformers → https://huggingface.co/spaces/abrar225/BreedAI
3. **Brain Tumor Detection** — Healthcare AI for MRI-based tumor detection (OpenCV, ML)
4. **Real vs AI Image Detector** — Deep learning system to identify AI-generated images
5. **Library Management System** — Full-stack ecosystem (Django, MySQL)

## Experience

- Full-Stack Python Intern at BrainyBeam IT Solutions (Jan–Mar 2026)
- Python Django Intern at BrainyBeam IT Solutions (Jul 2025)
- Web Developer & Designer Intern (Jun–Aug 2024)

## Certifications

- Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
- GUNIpreneur Bootcamp — 2nd Runner Up: Most Innovative Idea
- Smart India Hackathon participant
